title: clutia pterogona var. heterophylla
intro: Clutia pterogona var. heterophylla, also known as the Wild Tobacco or Clutia, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Clutia pterogona var. heterophylla include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
